ddls:
CREATE TABLE "solar_panels" (
  "panel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each solar panel installation */,
  "installation_name" TEXT /* Name of the installation */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the installation */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the installation was completed */,
  "installation_status" TEXT /* Current status of the installation */,
  "expected_lifetime" INTEGER /* Expected lifetime of the installation in years */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance activity */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance activity */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the installation location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the installation location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("panel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inverters" (
  "inverter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inverter */,
  "panel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solar panel installation the inverter belongs to */,
  "inverter_name" TEXT /* Name of the inverter */,
  "inverter_type" TEXT /* Type of the inverter */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the inverter was installed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the inverter */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the inverter manufacturer */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the inverter */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the inverter */,
  "warranty_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the inverter's warranty expires */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance activity */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inverter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inverters_panel_id FOREIGN KEY ("panel_id") REFERENCES solar_panels ("panel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strings" (
  "string_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each string */,
  "panel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solar panel installation the string belongs to */,
  "string_name" TEXT /* Name of the string */,
  "string_type" TEXT /* Type of the string */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the string was installed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the string */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the string manufacturer */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the string */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the string */,
  "warranty_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the string's warranty expires */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance activity */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("string_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_strings_panel_id FOREIGN KEY ("panel_id") REFERENCES solar_panels ("panel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reading */,
  "panel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solar panel installation the reading belongs to */,
  "inverter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inverter from which the reading was taken */,
  "string_id" INTEGER /* ID of the string from which the reading was taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the reading */,
  "ac_current" REAL /* AC current reading */,
  "dc_current_1" REAL /* DC current reading for string 1 */,
  "dc_current_2" REAL /* DC current reading for string 2 */,
  "energy_real_wac_sum_produced" REAL /* Real energy produced by the inverter */,
  "inverter_errors" TEXT /* Error codes from the inverter */,
  "power_real_pac_sum" REAL /* Real power produced by the inverter */,
  "temperature_powerstage" REAL /* Temperature of the powerstage */,
  "time_span_in_sec" INTEGER /* Time span in seconds */,
  "voltage_ac_phase_1" REAL /* Voltage of AC phase 1 */,
  "voltage_dc_string_1" REAL /* Voltage of DC string 1 */,
  "voltage_dc_string_2" REAL /* Voltage of DC string 2 */,
  "solar_irradiance" REAL /* Solar irradiance at the time of the reading */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions at the time of the reading */,
  "location_temperature" REAL /* Ambient temperature at the location of the installation */,
  "panel_temperature" REAL /* Temperature of the solar panel */,
  "is_error" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the reading contains an error */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readings_panel_id FOREIGN KEY ("panel_id") REFERENCES solar_panels ("panel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readings_string_id FOREIGN KEY ("string_id") REFERENCES strings ("string_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readings_inverter_id FOREIGN KEY ("inverter_id") REFERENCES inverters ("inverter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "errors" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error code */,
  "error_code" TEXT /* Error code */,
  "error_description" TEXT /* Description of the error code */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the error */,
  "resolution_steps" TEXT /* Steps to resolve the error */,
  "last_occurrence" TEXT /* Last date and time the error occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_errors_error_code FOREIGN KEY ("error_code") REFERENCES readings ("inverter_errors")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, technician, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "access_action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or device used to access the system */,
  "status_code" INTEGER /* HTTP status code of the access request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data included in the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "generated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "is_automated" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the report is generated automatically */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the notification */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message included in the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of the notification (e.g., error, maintenance, warning) */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the notification has been read by the user */,
  "is_acked" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the notification has been acknowledged by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance activity */,
  "panel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solar panel installation the maintenance activity belongs to */,
  "inverter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inverter that was maintained */,
  "string_id" INTEGER /* ID of the string that was maintained */,
  "maintenance_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the maintenance activity */,
  "maintenance_description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance activity (e.g., inspection, repair, replacement) */,
  "performed_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the maintenance */,
  "is_completed" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the maintenance activity is completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_performed_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("performed_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_string_id FOREIGN KEY ("string_id") REFERENCES strings ("string_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_panel_id FOREIGN KEY ("panel_id") REFERENCES solar_panels ("panel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_inverter_id FOREIGN KEY ("inverter_id") REFERENCES inverters ("inverter_id")
)
